hero.title: Free Destiny Matrix Calculator
hero.subtitle: Discover your life purpose, talents, and karmic patterns through your birth date

whatIsMatrix.title: What is the Destiny Matrix?
whatIsMatrix.body: The Destiny Matrix is a modern numerological system that maps your birth date onto a grid of 22 archetypal energies. Each position in the matrix reveals a different dimension of your life — your core talents, karmic lessons, relationship patterns, financial potential, and life purpose. Unlike simple numerology, the matrix reads how these energies interact with each other, giving you a complete picture of your personal blueprint.

cta.title: Ready to Discover Your Matrix?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of people who use their Destiny Matrix for clearer decisions and deeper self-understanding.
